response:
<<A RESEARCH ASSISTANT IS DESIGNING AN EXPERIMENT TO TEST THE EFFECTIVENESS OF A NEW DRUG ON REDUCING BLOOD PRESSURE. THE ASSISTANT COLLECTS DATA FROM A SAMPLE OF 50 PATIENTS, RECORDING THEIR BLOOD PRESSURE BEFORE AND AFTER ADMINISTERING THE DRUG. THE DATA COLLECTED IS AS FOLLOWS:>>

<<PRE-TREATMENT BLOOD PRESSURE: X1, X2, ..., X50>>  
<<POST-TREATMENT BLOOD PRESSURE: Y1, Y2, ..., Y50>>  

<<ASSUME THAT THE PRE-TREATMENT BLOOD PRESSURES XI ARE NORMALLY DISTRIBUTED WITH MEAN MU_X AND VARIANCE SIGMA_X2 SQUARE, AND THE POST-TREATMENT BLOOD PRESSURES YI ARE NORMALLY DISTRIBUTED WITH MEAN MU_Y AND VARIANCE SIGMA_Y2 SQUARE. LET THE COVARIANCE BETWEEN XI AND YI BE SIGMA_XY>>  

<<1. DERIVE THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATORS (MLEs) FOR THE PARAMETERS MU_X, MU_Y, SIGMA_X2 SQUARE, SIGMA_Y2 SQUARE, AND SIGMA_XY GIVEN THE DATA>>  

<<THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATORS FOR THE PARAMETERS ARE AS FOLLOWS:>>

<<THE MLE FOR MU_X IS THE SAMPLE MEAN OF THE PRE-TREATMENT BLOOD PRESSURES: [X_BAR]>>  
<<THE MLE FOR MU_Y IS THE SAMPLE MEAN OF THE POST-TREATMENT BLOOD PRESSURES: [Y_BAR]>>  
<<THE MLE FOR SIGMA_X2 SQUARE IS THE SAMPLE VARIANCE OF THE PRE-TREATMENT BLOOD PRESSURES: [S_X2]>>  
<<THE MLE FOR SIGMA_Y2 SQUARE IS THE SAMPLE VARIANCE OF THE POST-TREATMENT BLOOD PRESSURES: [S_Y2]>>  
<<THE MLE FOR SIGMA_XY IS THE SAMPLE COVARIANCE BETWEEN THE PRE-TREATMENT AND POST-TREATMENT BLOOD PRESSURES: [S_XY]>>  

<<2. TO TEST THE HYPOTHESIS THAT THE DRUG HAS A SIGNIFICANT EFFECT ON REDUCING BLOOD PRESSURE, FORMULATE AND CONDUCT A HYPOTHESIS TEST USING THE DERIVED MLEs. STATE THE NULL AND ALTERNATIVE HYPOTHESIS
